creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Change of the plan. Having 2018Q3 stuck with 61.1 would increase MFH risk and complicate regression tracking. I've tested locally all (~120 total) consumers on 10.4 i386 and 11.1 amd64 with *default options*. As there was no fallout let's land and compare.

Thank you for the partial exp-run, anyway.
